name: Ivri, Kerner & Co
message: Ivri, Kerner & Co Hacked In the name of truth and memory, This is Handala, the barefoot witness of injustice. Today, the illusion of power and privacy at Ivri, Kerner & Co. a so-called pillar of legal integrity, has been shattered. Their walls of encryption have crumbled like the fences they helped build. Their vaults…
